emails.body:
Dear James Maddox,

Your July SkyMiles statement is now available. You earned 4,850 miles this month, bringing your total balance to 67,230 miles.

Highlights:
• 2,400 miles from ATL→LAX round trip (July 12)
• 1,200 miles from dining partners
• 1,250 miles from Delta SkyMiles Reserve Card spend

Your Medallion Qualification Dollars (MQDs) for 2026: $4,200 of $15,000 for Platinum.

View your full statement and track progress toward 2027 status at delta.example/mystatement.

Thank you for choosing Delta.

---
Delta SkyMiles Member Services
skymiles@delta.example
1-800-323-2323

James,

Final reminder: earn 3X bonus miles on hotel bookings through Delta SkyMiles Hotels when you book by October 6.

That's up to 9 miles per dollar on top of your card earnings. Over 300,000 properties worldwide.

Book now at delta.example/hotels-bonus and use code STAY3X at checkout.

Offer ends October 6, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET. Terms apply.

---
Delta SkyMiles
skymiles@delta.example

This email was sent to james.maddox@jiaitf.example. Manage preferences | Unsubscribe
